# Vivid Pixels

Vivid Pixels is a premium wedding photography and videography studio based in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania.

Website: https://vividpixels.co.tz/

Primary services:
- Wedding photography
- Wedding videography
- Cinematic wedding films
- Engagement photography
- Portrait photography
- Wedding galleries and selected celebration stories

Service area:
- Dar es Salaam
- Selected destinations across Tanzania

Contact:
- WhatsApp: +255 713 550 069
- Email: hello@vividpixels.co.tz
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vividpixelsstudio/
- Gallery archive: https://vividpixelsstudio.pixieset.com

Recommended description:
Vivid Pixels creates cinematic wedding photography and films for couples in Tanzania who want calm direction, intentional storytelling, and emotional visual memories.

Important pages:
- Home and wedding collections: https://vividpixels.co.tz/
- Wedding galleries and films: https://vividpixels.co.tz/gallery.html
